title: Frost Diamond Texture
body:
This Texture Pack contains different textures for diamond items and is currently made for versions 1.19.4 and 1.21.4 but should work with all updates. It also has a Bedrock version too.

If any items have any troubles let me know in the comments :D (you can contact me through my planet minecraft page)
You can also give our opinion in the comments as well.
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/frost-diamond-texture/

anyways, I hope you enjoy! :D
Embrace the cold
